name: Real-Time Multi-Camera Tracking System
impact: 110+ FPS single cam, 95 FPS multi-cam, stable IDs under occlusion and camera transitions
description: Production CV pipeline for real-time multi-camera tracking and re-identification at 110+ FPS on RTX GPUs. Handles occlusion, ID drift, and camera transitions with confidence gating, track aging logic, and appearance-based re-ID.

name: Real-Time Exercise Repetition Analyzer
impact: Wearable-free rep counting for 5 exercises in real time, joint angle graphs, per-person stats
description: Detects body keypoints via pose estimation, computes joint angles, tracks motion phases and counts reps for squats, push-ups, bicep curls, shoulder press and sit-ups. Supports smart fitness coaching and rehabilitation tracking without wearable sensors.

name: Football Player Tracking & Cross-Camera Re-ID
stack: YOLOv5, ByteTrack, BoTSORT, CLIP, Hungarian Matching, Python
impact: Persistent player IDs across broadcast + tacticam feeds, real-time annotated output
description: Detects and tracks players/referees using YOLOv5 + ByteTrack, then re-identifies across broadcast and tactical camera angles using CLIP embeddings and Hungarian Matching for persistent player IDs.

name: Football Match Analytics Suite
stack: YOLOv5, KMeans, Optical Flow, Perspective Transform, Python
impact: Jersey-color team clustering, ball possession tracking, pixel-to-meter speed/distance metrics per player
description: Full match analytics pipeline: KMeans jersey-color clustering for team assignment, optical flow for camera motion compensation, perspective transform converting pixel coordinates to real-world speed and distance metrics per player.

name: Predictive Machine Failure Monitoring System
impact: Random Forest on AI4I dataset, unified risk score from failure prob + overload ratio + RMS vibration, Normal/Warning/Critical classification
description: ML pipeline combining Random Forest failure probability, electrical overload ratio, and RMS vibration into a unified risk score. Logs all telemetry to SQLite for historical analysis. Supports Industry 4.0 predictive maintenance use cases.

name: Financial Fraud Detection Pipeline
description: Fraud detection pipeline over 6M+ financial transactions using Cleanlab label-noise correction and ensemble classifiers — achieving 18% F1 improvement, 22% recall gain, and 14% reduction in false positives.

name: Two-Tier ML + LLM Fake News Detection Pipeline
impact: 99% ML classifier accuracy, LLM layer adds explainability for borderline cases
description: Two-stage pipeline: a 99%-accurate ML classifier as first filter, followed by an LLM verification layer via LangChain for explainable verdicts on borderline cases.

name: LLM Personalization via Community-Level Prompt Profiling
impact: Improved LLM response relevance without fine-tuning using community behavior clustering
description: Clusters users by community behavior patterns and generates personalized prompt profiles for each cluster, improving LLM response relevance without any model fine-tuning.

name: Automated Book Publishing — RAG Multi-Agent System
impact: End-to-end automated pipeline from raw source material to published output
description: Multi-agent system using RAG to generate, edit, and structure book content from raw source material, with TTS APIs for audio output. Fully automated publishing pipeline with no manual steps.

name: Emotional Speech Analysis — RAVDESS Dataset
impact: 5700+ audio files, 24 actors, MFCC + pitch + energy + spectral centroid feature extraction
description: Built an acoustic feature extraction pipeline on the RAVDESS dataset (5700+ files, 24 actors). Extracted MFCC, pitch, energy, spectral centroid, and zero-crossing rate to analyze how emotional states affect vocal characteristics. Foundation for an emotion classification model.

name: Heart Disease Prediction & Clinical Feature Analysis
impact: Correlation matrix analysis for feature selection, ML model for heart disease prediction
description: Built a clinical data analysis pipeline for heart disease prediction. Performed correlation analysis to identify high-signal features, applied ML classification models, and generated visual analytics to make healthcare insights interpretable.

name: Mutual Fund Clustering via PCA & Risk Profiling
stack: Python, Scikit-learn, PCA, KMeans, Pandas, Matplotlib
impact: 6 distinct investment profiles identified from conservative low-risk to aggressive high-volatility
description: Applied PCA and KMeans clustering to mutual fund data, identifying 6 distinct investment profiles ranging from conservative low-risk to aggressive high-volatility. Visual analytics validate methodology and make complex financial insights accessible.

name: Multi-Sensor IoT Data Integration Framework
impact: Unified analytics pipeline across heterogeneous sensor sources
description: Normalizes and merges data from heterogeneous IoT sensor streams into a unified SQL-backed analytics pipeline, handling schema mismatches and missing data across sources.

name: Emotion Recognition from Motion & Biosignals
impact: Multi-modal emotion classification across 6 emotional states
description: Fuses skeletal motion data and biosignals using PyTorch for multi-modal emotion classification. Handles noisy sensor inputs with signal processing filters across 6 emotional states.

name: AI Job Application Automation Agent
stack: Python, Groq (LLaMA 3.3 70B), Gmail API, BeautifulSoup, Node.js
impact: 200+ jobs scraped per run across 7 boards, auto-applies via Gmail, auto-replies to interviews, follow-ups after 4 days, halts on offer acceptance
description: Fully autonomous multi-agent job application system. Scrapes 7 job boards, uses LLaMA 3.3 70B via Groq to select best-fit projects and write tailored cover letters, builds custom DOCX+PDF resumes, sends applications via Gmail API, monitors inbox for replies, auto-replies to interview invites, sends follow-ups after 4 days of silence, and stops automatically on offer acceptance. Includes a live HTML dashboard.

name: AI Evaluation & Research — micro1 Certified Analyst
stack: AI model evaluation, output analysis, research methodology
impact: Certified Data & AI Research Analyst by micro1 after structured AI evaluation interview
description: Completed micro1's AI evaluation interview process covering AI system analysis, model output evaluation, and applied research thinking. Certified as Data & AI Research Analyst. Applied across anomaly detection, NLP, predictive analytics, and financial analytics domains.
